parameters.query:
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS tmp_relatorio_interacoes_dia_anterior;

CREATE TEMP TABLE tmp_relatorio_interacoes_dia_anterior (
  ai_assistant_id text,
  owner_name text,
  ai_assistant_name text,
  recipient_email text,
  id bigint,
  session_id text,
  sender text,
  sender_name text,
  message_type text,
  user_message text,
  ai_response text,
  created_at timestamptz,
  profile_name text
);

DO $$
DECLARE
  t record;
BEGIN
  FOR t IN
    SELECT
      tenant_code,
      schema_name,
      COALESCE(full_name, organization_name, tenant_code) AS owner_name,
      COALESCE(assistant_persona_name, full_name, tenant_code) AS ai_assistant_name,
      COALESCE(
        NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'report_email', ''),
        NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'email_relatorio', ''),
        NULLIF(organization_metadata->>'email', ''),
        'contato@bahiatecnologia.com.br'
      ) AS recipient_email
    FROM clinicas.tenants
  LOOP
    EXECUTE format($q$
      INSERT INTO tmp_relatorio_interacoes_dia_anterior (
        ai_assistant_id, owner_name, ai_assistant_name, recipient_email,
        id, session_id, sender, sender_name, message_type,
        user_message, ai_response, created_at, profile_name
      )
      SELECT
        %L AS ai_assistant_id,
        %L AS owner_name,
        %L AS ai_assistant_name,
        %L AS recipient_email,
        c.id,
        c.telefone AS session_id,
        c.telefone AS sender,
        c.nome AS sender_name,
        'text'::text AS message_type,
        c.mensagem AS user_message,
        c.resposta_ia AS ai_response,
        c.data_hora AS created_at,
        c.nome AS profile_name
      FROM %I.conversas c
      WHERE c.data_hora >= (CURRENT_DATE - INTERVAL '1 day')::timestamptz
        AND c.data_hora < CURRENT_DATE::timestamptz
      ORDER BY c.telefone, c.data_hora
    $q$,
      t.tenant_code,
      t.owner_name,
      t.ai_assistant_name,
      t.recipient_email,
      t.schema_name
    );
  END LOOP;
END $$;

SELECT
  ai_assistant_id,
  owner_name,
  ai_assistant_name,
  recipient_email,
  id,
  session_id,
  sender,
  sender_name,
  message_type,
  user_message,
  ai_response,
  created_at,
  profile_name
FROM tmp_relatorio_interacoes_dia_anterior
ORDER BY ai_assistant_name, session_id, created_at;
